properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "# SpyCloud Exposure Dashboard
**Enterprise Exposure Monitoring** - Comprehensive view of credential and identity exposures detected across darknet sources.

> This workbook focuses exclusively on SpyCloudExposure_CL data for tracking organizational exposure to data breaches and leaks.

---"}, "name": "title"}, {"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "exp_time_range", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "type": 4, "isRequired": true, "value": {"durationMs": 2592000000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}, {"durationMs": 7776000000}], "allowCustom": true}, "label": "Time Range"}, {"id": "exp_sev_filter", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "SeverityFilter", "type": 2, "isRequired": false, "multiSelect": true, "quote": "", "delimiter": ",", "query": "SpyCloudExposure_CL | distinct severity | order by severity desc", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": ["value::all"]}, "defaultValue": "value::all", "label": "Severity"}]}, "name": "parameters"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(Label:string, Value:long, Order:int)["Total Exposures", 0, 1, "Unique Emails", 0, 2, "Unique Domains", 0, 3, "Critical Exposures", 0, 4, "Plaintext Passwords", 0, 5]),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Total Exposures", Order=1 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email) | extend Label="Unique Emails", Order=2 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | summarize v=dcount(email_domain) | extend Label="Unique Domains", Order=3 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where severity == 25 | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Critical Exposures", Order=4 | project Label, Value=v, Order),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} | where isnotempty(password_plaintext) | summarize v=count() | extend Label="Plaintext Passwords", Order=5 | project Label, Value=v, Order)
| summarize Value=max(Value) by Label, Order
| order by Order asc", "size": 4, "title": "Exposure Overview", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "tiles", "tileSettings": {"titleContent": {"columnMatch": "Label", "formatter": 1}, "leftContent": {"columnMatch": "Value", "formatter": 12, "formatOptions": {"palette": "auto"}}}}, "name": "exposureTiles"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend SeverityLabel = case(severity == 25, "Critical", severity == 20, "High", severity == 5, "Medium", severity == 2, "Low", "Other")
| summarize Count=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d), SeverityLabel
| order by TimeGenerated asc)", "size": 0, "title": "Exposure Trend by Severity (Daily)", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "areachart", "chartSettings": {"seriesLabelSettings": [{"seriesName": "Critical", "color": "redBright"}, {"seriesName": "High", "color": "orange"}, {"seriesName": "Medium", "color": "yellow"}, {"seriesName": "Low", "color": "blue"}]}}, "name": "exposureTrend"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email)
| summarize Exposures=count(), MaxSeverity=max(severity), PlaintextPWs=countif(isnotempty(password_plaintext)), DistinctSources=dcount(source_id), LatestExposure=max(TimeGenerated) by email
| extend RiskLevel = case(MaxSeverity == 25, "CRITICAL", MaxSeverity == 20, "HIGH", MaxSeverity == 5, "MEDIUM", "LOW")
| top 25 by MaxSeverity desc, Exposures desc
| project User=email, RiskLevel, Exposures, PlaintextPWs, DistinctSources, LatestExposure)", "size": 0, "title": "Top 25 Exposed Users", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "table", "gridSettings": {"sortBy": [{"itemKey": "Exposures", "sortOrder": 2}]}}, "name": "topExposedUsers"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(email_domain)
| summarize ExposureCount=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email), CriticalCount=countif(severity == 25) by tostring(email_domain)
| order by ExposureCount desc
| take 20)", "size": 1, "title": "Exposures by Email Domain", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "exposuresByDomain"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "union isfuzzy=true
(datatable(d:string)[]),
(SpyCloudExposure_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange} and isnotempty(source_id)
| summarize Records=count(), UniqueUsers=dcount(email) by tostring(source_id)
| order by Records desc
| take 15)", "size": 1, "title": "Top Exposure Sources by Record Count", "queryType": 0, "visualization": "barchart"}, "name": "topSources"}], "templateMetadata": {"version": "1.0", "connectorAssociation": [{"connectorId": "SpyCloudExposure", "dataTypes": ["SpyCloudExposure_CL"]}]}}
